CSCO.rationale: Solid fundamentals with improving quarterly trajectory and strong margins are partially offset by valuation near the top of its recent range, yielding a mild long lean.

V.rationale: Visa's world-class margins and ROE, steady revenue growth, and positive strategic initiatives make it a quality hold, but the 20.6% one-year price run-up and absence of valuation-discount evidence cap the risk-adjusted reward to a mild long lean.

Steady revenue growth: quarterly revenue rose from 7.79B (Sep-22) to 7.99B (Mar-23), ~2.6% YoY
Strategic expansion via Pismo acquisition (Jun 29) and SAP partnership for B2B in Asia-Pacific (Jun 28)

BA.rationale: Boeing remains unprofitable with negative book equity and 55B in debt, yet the stock has already rallied 54% in the past year — the recovery optimism is priced in while the fundamental and competitive risks remain acute.
